actions.name: SOLANA_TRANSFER
actions.description: Transfer SOL or SPL tokens from the agent's Solana wallet to another address
actions.descriptionCompressed: Solana transfer: send SOL or SPL tokens to another address.

actions.name: SOLANA_SWAP
actions.description: Perform a token swap from one token to another on Solana. Works with SOL and SPL tokens.
actions.descriptionCompressed: Solana token swap: SOL or SPL tokens via Jupiter routing.
